# fly_machines (Data Source)

Lists machines in a Fly.io application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_machines" "all" {
  app = "my-app"
}

output "machine_ids" {
  value = [for m in data.fly_machines.all.machines : m.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) The application name.

### Read-Only

- `machines` (Attributes List) The list of machines. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--machines))

<a id="nestedatt--machines"></a>
### Nested Schema for `machines`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Created timestamp.
- `id` (String) Machine ID.
- `image` (String) Docker image.
- `instance_id` (String) Instance ID.
- `name` (String) Machine name.
- `private_ip` (String) Private IP.
- `region` (String) Region.
- `state` (String) Current state.
- `updated_at` (String) Updated timestamp.
